official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the block_destruction packet id.
Official binary source for constructing, decoding, and writing the block_destruction body.
Official binary source for the breaker id, block position, and progress body shape.
Official binary source for writing and dispatch-decoding the full Play clientbound block_destruction frame.

field_notes.fixture: Uses the official public constructor and STREAM_CODEC with a context-free BlockPos value and progress byte, then re-encodes through the official Play clientbound protocol codec. The fixture does not require initialized Minecraft/game state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound block_destruction packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official breaker id, block position, and progress fixture only; do not infer block break animation semantics, entity existence, client world state, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
